scope: Consume the existing repo-recorded workspace account edge-state handoff by adding explicit session-expired, disabled-account, reset-required, and no-active-assignment states to the canonical authenticated workspace.
selected_slice: Add and prove account edge-state behavior for expired sessions, disabled accounts, required password resets, and mentors without active assignments, without direct Figma work.
changes: Changed /api/auth/me to preserve fresh signed-out 401 behavior while returning specific account blockers for expired sessions, disabled accounts, and password-reset-required accounts.
Added workspace sign-in/account-state rendering for session-expired, account-disabled, and reset-required responses.
Added no-active-assignment workspace state markers for mentors with no assigned students.
Added a local-only mentor_no_assignment fake .test account to the workspace smoke seed.
Expanded auth integration tests for expired, disabled, pending-reset, and credential-flag reset-required /api/auth/me behavior.
Expanded workspace source/VM tests and HTTP smoke asset checks for the new state markers.

validation.summary: Focused auth integration coverage passed for expired-session, disabled-account, pending-reset, and credential-flag reset-required /api/auth/me responses.
Workspace source/VM coverage passed for session-expired, account-disabled, reset-required, role-pending, permission-denied, and no-active-assignment rendering.
Portable workspace smoke asset checks passed, with opt-in HTTP checks skipped when no base URL was set.
Production surface leak check passed with 91 production text surfaces scanned.
Seeded seven local-only fake .test workspace accounts, including mentor_no_assignment, without printing passwords.
Credential-backed local HTTP smoke passed, including mentor_no_assignment returning assignedStudents: [].
Signed in as mentor_no_assignment, verified the no-active-assignment overview/mentor empty states, and observed zero console errors.
Full test suite passed: 134 tests, 131 passing and 3 expected opt-in workspace smoke skips.
Aggregate check passed with static Cloudflare verification; live Cloudflare verification remained blocked without CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.

blockers.message: Non-interactive Cloudflare Pages/D1 deployment and secret inspection remains blocked because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is not set.
blockers.next_action: Provide a scoped Cloudflare API token or use an approved Cloudflare connector for read-only remote inspection and hosted workspace edge-state proof.

blockers.message: Live Drive upload/download remains blocked because Cloudflare Pages is missing GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY.
blockers.next_action: Add the Drive credential secrets in Cloudflare Pages, then rerun Drive probe plus small and >5MB upload/download through a fake .test account.

next_actions: After deployment, prove hosted workspace behavior for session-expired, disabled-account, reset-required, and no-active-assignment states.
Continue MVP-017 dashboard surfacing for presentation slot status/check-out/check-in if hosted workspace edge-state proof remains blocked.
Run live Drive upload/download proof after Bryan configures Cloudflare Pages Drive secrets.

automation_efficiency.scale_signal: accepted implementation pass; no cadence change recommended

phone_tracker.reason: Google Sheets connector was not used in this run; repo-local closeout evidence was preserved.

closeout_commit_sha: reported in final response because a closeout commit cannot contain its own hash
